entities.context: Collaborator V coordinates with, referenced by [LOG] tag in calendar events

entities.name: Ilse
entities.context: Collaborator V coordinates with, referenced by [ILS] tag in calendar events

entities.name: N5OS
entities.context: Tagging system for calendar event descriptions with structured tag categories

entities.name: Digest
entities.context: System that processes calendar events and N5OS tags, generates meeting summaries

entities.name: Lead/Stakeholder Types
entities.context: Classification system for contacts: Investor, Job seeker, Community partner, Business partner, General prospect

entities.name: Timing Tags
entities.context: Scheduling urgency indicators: CRITICAL, D5, D5+, D10 for time-sensitive scheduling

entities.name: Status Tags
entities.context: Meeting status tracking: Postponed (OFF), Awaiting response (AWA), Terminated (TERM)

entities.name: Coordination Tags
entities.context: Collaboration indicators that auto-surface in digest to flag coordination needs

entities.name: Weekend Indicators
entities.context: Tags [WEP] and [WEX] for highlighting weekend meetings

relationships.context: Coordination flagged via [LOG] tag in calendar events
Coordination flagged via [ILS] tag in calendar events
Digest recognizes and processes N5OS tags from calendar descriptions
CATG category defines lead classification tags
TWIN category defines scheduling urgency tags
POST category defines meeting status tags
CORD category defines collaboration indicator tags
LD-INV investor tag auto-sets CRITICAL priority timing
